name: Tray.io
description: Tray.io — Enterprise iPaaS and workflow automation platform with API for building integrations into SaaS products.

seo.title: Tray.io — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Tray.io: Tray.io — Enterprise iPaaS and workflow automation platform with API for building integrations into SaaS products.

when_to_use: iPaaS platform for embedding workflow automation in SaaS
Enterprise integration between Salesforce and data warehouse
Internal tool automation via drag-and-drop workflow builder
API-based trigger-action flows for B2B product integrations

review.verdict: Capable enterprise iPaaS with embed support, but costs escalate fast and n8n covers simpler cases cheaply.
review.best_for: SaaS companies embedding native integrations into products
review.not_for: Small teams automating internal workflows on a budget
